zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Burgoyne於1500年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達時，她的父親Sir Christopher Burgoyne26歲，母親Thomasine Freville27歲。她於1518年與John Joseph Leete of Eversden在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾艾福斯達結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1564年5月18日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾艾福斯達享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Burgoyne于1500年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Burgoyne26岁，母亲Thomasine Freville27岁。她于1518年与John Joseph Leete of Eversden在英国英格兰坎布利其爾艾福斯達结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1564年5月18日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾艾福斯達享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Middle English Burgoin, Old French Bourgogne, Latin Burgundia), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the West Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404, duke from 1363).

variants.name: Burgin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy, Old French Bourgogne, Bourgoin ‘the Burgundian’. Alternatively, from the synonymous name Burgoyne .
Swiss German (Bürgin): from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

variants.name: Burgamy
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Burgany, itself a variant of Burgoyne (Middle English Bourgoine, Burgonye ‘Burgundy’). This form of the name is now rare or absent in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Burgoyne was born in 1500, in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, was 26 and her mother, Thomasine Freville, was 27. She married John Joseph Leete of Eversden in 1518, in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 18 May 1564, in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Burgoyne est née en 1500, à Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Freville, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Joseph Leete of Eversden en 1518, à Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1564, à Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Burgoyne 1500 in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Burgoyne 26 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Freville 27. Sie hat 1518 in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom John Joseph Leete of Eversden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1564 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Burgoyne è nata il nel 1500 nel Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Freville, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Joseph Leete of Eversden nel 1518, nel Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 18 maggio 1564, nel Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Burgoyneが1500年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアリットル エバースデンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Burgoyneは26歳，母Thomasine Frevilleは27歳であった。1518年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエバースデンでJohn Joseph Leete of Eversdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1564年5月18日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエバースデンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Burgoyne(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 리틀 에버즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Burgoyne(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Freville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 에버즈든에서 John Joseph Leete of Eversden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 에버즈든에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Burgoyne nasceu em 1500, em Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Freville, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Joseph Leete of Eversden em 1518, em Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1564, em Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Burgoyne родилась в 1500 г. в местности литл эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Burgoyne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Freville, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Joseph Leete of Eversden в 1518 г. в местности эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 18 мая 1564 г. в местности эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Burgoyne nació en 1500, en Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Thomasine Freville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Joseph Leete of Eversden en 1518, en Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1564, en Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
